creator: petef@databits.net
text:
++ 18/06/01 17:34 -0500 - David W. Chapman Jr.:
| What is the latest on this port, I'm going to put it in suspend if its 
| still waiting on the reasons listed in the audit-trail.
| 

I'd love to have an editors/joe29 port, at least.  A lot of my users
like the latest version of joe, so I'd imagine other people do, too.
What are your thoughts on that?

-pete
